title: Filtering by search results on a board
excerpt: When I search in a board & it returns me the results, I would like to save the search results as a view or filter. As an example I want to see all tasks with the acronym UAT in it. After I search I would like to save tho…

posts.author: achau (Amy Chau)
posts.cookedHtml: When I search in a board & it returns me the results, I would like to save the search results as a view or filter. As an example I want to see all tasks with the acronym UAT in it. After I search I would like to save those results as a view. This would help a lot with productivity.

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml: You could use the Filter for anything you need and save it as a new view.

posts.author: achau (Amy Chau)
posts.cookedHtml: The filter option is helpful, but unfortunately we can’t filter by the specific words or phrases on a board. As an example my team member wants to see any task that contains the word UAT or have UAT in any context through the search but it doesn’t allow for it to save the search as a view.
